title: E14 Salt Lamp Bulbs Dimmable, 15W Pygmy Bulb Small Edison Screw SES Oven Light 300°C, T20 Scentsy Warmer 2700K Warm White Sewing Machine Bulb, Fridge Microwave 3-Pack
features: 🌡️【300°C Withstand Temperature】E14 oven bulb is made of high quality heat-resistant glass and high melting point solder, can withstand temperature up to 300°C that makes it suitable for use in lamps and fixtures that generate high heat, such as oven light bulb, microwaves light bulb, wax melt light bulb.
🌅【Dimmable SES Pygmy Bulb】The 15W fridge bulb screw is dimmable, you can adjust the brightness with the dimmer switch to meet different lighting needs. No flicker, no buzzing.

✨ 【Widely Application】E14 pygmy light bulb suitable for himalayan salt lamp, oven light, cooker hood light, fridges, refrigerators, sewing machine, scentsy max warmer, night lights and other E14 small edison screw household appliances.
🟠【Warm White Light】The E14 salt lamp bulb with 2700K warm white light, soothing glow light that can create a relaxing atmosphere that is good for reducing stress and promoting better sleep.

💡【Easy to Use】This scentsy warmer bulb works with E14 Small Edison Screw (SES) fitting. Diameter 20mm, Height 50mm. Simply install the bulb directly into a small screw base lighting accessory or oven.
